text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Spring Fan Fest! Students are
partaking in contests to entertain the fans, and
Eishin Flash is no exception.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has won the ping-pong relay with her
unparalleled footwork, and she didn't drop the
ball a single time!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I thank you all for your support.

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Lady Flash... I wish I could talk with her, even
once...

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text:
As if that'll happen. But I'm happy just watching
her from a distance. Wow, just look at her
beautifully glossy hair.

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She's so sublime, there's no way I'll ever get to
see her up close... Oh, she's wonderful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Eishin Flash's fans are just as reserved as
she is.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I have completed every competition I
registered for.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The last competition ended earlier than expected
so I have unanticipated free time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you have no preference for what I should do
next, I would like to search for another
competition I can join last-minute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fan from earlier comes to mind. Even if it's a
bit forced, maybe there's a way Eishin Flash's fans
can interact with her...
choice_data_list: In that case, I have a suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
It's time for everyone's favorite event, the
fan-carrying contest!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The rules are simple. Fans will introduce
themselves, and the first contestant to reach the
finish line with one of them wins!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The G Block participants are Gold Ship,
Nakayama Festa, and Eishin Flash!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
A big thanks to the fans participating! Now, which
pair will reach the finish first?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hah! I choose you! Here it comes...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Golshi's ☆... Burlap Sack of Destiny!

text_block_list.name: Golshi Fan
text_block_list.text:
Gaaaaah! You're literally carrying me like a sack
of potatoes?! You're too rough! Ow! It's dark, and
I'm scared!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You there. You've got a look of luck about you.
Come with me.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Fan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait... Wha?! Whoaaa! H-how are you
carrying me with just one arm?! You're incredible!

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text: O-oh no! Lady Flash is going to lose!

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text: B-but there's nothing I could possibly do to help...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me. Are the colors of your flag meant to
match my signature racewear?

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Y-yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment she gets her answer, Eishin Flash
grabs hold of her fan's hand.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's no time. Would you please lend me your
strength?

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text: Really?! ...Of course!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now, pardon me.

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text: I-I-I'm being princess carried!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship wins G Block! She ran so fast, I think
her fan's soul is still somewhere out on the track!

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry... I-I should've announced myself to
you sooner!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, don't worry. There was no defeating Gold
Ship in an event like this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I cherish my fans too much to treat them in such a
manner.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I do hope you aren't feeling ill.

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hnggg... I love you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, um... Thank you very much. Now, are
you feeling all right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash might have lost the event, but she
was able to grow closer to a fan.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Eishin Flash wins the race! Despite her late
start, she was able to claim victory with a truly
legendary surge on the homestretch!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to how securely you were holding on to
me, I was able to run at full speed without issue.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan A
text_block_list.text: N-no, thank you! It was... It was truly an honor!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What a hasty retreat... I was hoping to talk
together a while longer...

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan B
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who are all of you?

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan C
text_block_list.text: We're all your fans, Lady Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: "Lady"?

text_block_list.name: Flash Fan D
text_block_list.text:
After seeing that last event, we knew we had to
work up the courage to speak with you! Um, we
won't ask you to carry us or anything, but could
we please spend some time together?!

text_block_list.name: Flash Fans
text_block_list.text: Please, Lady Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list: I'll go and see if I can set up a meet-and-greet!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Eishin Flash is able to deepen her bond
with many fans.
